Salesforce CRM frequently asked questions
Is Salesforce a CRM?
Yes. Salesforce CRM offers AI-powered,
customer relationship management (CRM)
software that makes it easier for companies to build customer relationships, be more productive, and increase efficiency. This helps businesses of all sizes and in all industries conect with customers and prospects at scale.
Salesforce CRM brings together all your data onto
one integrated platform
that unites your
sales
,
service
,
marketing
,
commerce
, and
IT teams
with a single, shared view of your customer.
Is Salesforce an online CRM?
Yes. Salesforce is an online CRM, also known as a
cloud-based CRM
. It is a
Software as a Service (SaaS)
platform, which delivers applications over the internet. As a cloud-based CRM system, all platform hosting and maintenence is performed by Salesforce, eliminating many of the costs and responsibilities involved in maintaining CRM infrastructure and security management.
How much does Salesforce CRM cost?
There are a variety of Salesforce
CRM pricing
options. You can also view all
Salesforce product pricing here
.
What types of businesses use Salesforce?
Salesforce is built to be a scalable and
customizable CRM
, so that it can meet the needs of businesses across all sizes, stages, and industries. Salesforce provides
enterprise CRM
options, as well as
CRM for small businesses
and
CRM for startups
.
How easy is it to use Salesforce?
Salesforce was built to be easy-to-use by all employees across your entire organization. Salesforce has an intuitive interface, which lets you interact with Salesforce CRM through
conversational AI
, the way you would speak to a colleague. With
Trailhead
, Salesforce's free online learning platform, anyone can learn in-demand skills, earn resume-worthy credentials, gain
CRM certification
, and connect to new career opportunities.
What are the most popular CRM features?
There are many
CRM features
that benefit businesses. Some of them include contact management, collaboration tools like
Slack
,
automation
,
analytics
and
reporting
,
AI (Artificial Intelligence)
,
customization
,
integration
,
cloud-based mobile accessibility
, flexibility, and the ability to scale as you grow.
What are the benefits of CRM?
CRM benefits
companies in many different ways. Some of them include more productive sales teams, a single view of the customer, actionable
analytics
and data dashboards, customer-centric
automation
, proactive customer service interactions, simplified collaboration, increased productivity with
artificial intelligence (AI)
,
integration
with your existing business apps, access to your information from anywhere, scalability for growth, and security you can trust.
What are some CRM use cases?
Read about Salesforce CRM
customer stories
here. Salesforce is used by companies of every size, stage, and industry around the world, providing many
CRM examples
by successful businesses across
sales
,
service
,
marketing
,
commerce
,
IT
, and more.
How does CRM help sales teams?
Salesforce is a sales CRM that helps teams sell faster, smarter, and more efficiently.
Sales Cloud
is part of the #1 AI CRM, which empowers sellers, sales leaders, sales operations — and even partners — with data from any source and built-in
trusted AI
. With Salesforce, sales organizations can engage buyers, improve productivity, close deals faster, and grow revenue with sales software on the most complete platform for sales.
In addition to sales, Salesforce also offers
CRM for Marketing (Marketing Cloud)
,
CRM for Service (Service Cloud)
,
CRM for Commerce (Commerce Cloud)
,
CRM for Data (Data 360)
, and more. Salesforce CRM and apps provide one single source of truth with the most up-to-date customer information, helping strengthen the customer relationship at every point of the the customer lifecycle.
Is Salesforce CRM only for sales teams?
Sales Cloud
is just one part of Salesforce CRM, which is built to be used by teams across your business, including
Service Cloud
,
Marketing Cloud
,
Commerce Cloud
,
Agentforce 360 Platform for IT
,
Data 360
, and more. Salesforce brings your teams together with a consolidated view of customer data, empowering you to nurture relationships with your clients and leads.
What is CRM in Marketing?
CRM apps like
Marketing Cloud
helps businesses manage and optimize marketing efforts with current and potential customers. It enables businesses to create,
automate
, and personalize marketing campaigns using email, social media, mobile messaging, advertising, and web channels. Marketing CRM, together with
marketing AI
, utilizes your customer data to create personalized communications aimed at growing lasting customer relationships to boost customer retention and revenue. Combined with CRM for
sales
,
service
,
commerce
,
data
, and
IT
, CRM marketing gives you access to unified customer profiles, rapid audience segmentation, content creation, campaign management, analytics, and customer journey mapping.
Does Salesforce have CRM integration with other apps?
Yes. Salesforce is built for
CRM integration
, making sure that your business is able to share data across internal and external applications.
Salesforce's MuleSoft
is a unified platform that provides businesses with the essential building blocks for connected experiences, products, and services.
With Salesforce CRM, you can integrate all of your data, systems, or AI models, and automate any task or process to transform your business and drive real value.
AppExchange
is a robust SaaS marketplace, where Salesforce partners build custom apps that can be used with your Salesforce CRM.
